title: rosa coriifolia var. pubescens
intro: Rosa coriifolia var. pubescens, also known as the hairy rose or prickly rose, is a plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to their high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Rosa coriifolia var. pubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to provide health benefits such as antioxidant, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects.
